# Pitt Party Bus

> Pittsburgh's #1 party bus and limousine rental company serving the greater Pittsburgh, PA area since 2010.

## About

Pitt Party Bus LLC provides premium party bus and limousine rental services in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. We offer a diverse fleet of vehicles accommodating 10-40+ passengers for all types of events and occasions. Available 24/7 with pricing starting at $100-$175/hour.

## Contact

- Phone: (412) 385-3877
- Email: info@pittpartybus.com
- Website: https://pittpartybus.com
- Location: Pittsburgh, PA 15222

## Services

- Wedding Transportation
- Prom & Homecoming
- Bachelor & Bachelorette Parties
- Corporate Event Transportation
- Concert & Sporting Event Shuttles
- Wine Tour & Brewery Tours
- Airport Transfers
- Birthday Celebrations
- Night Out on the Town

## Fleet

We maintain a fleet of party buses and limousines ranging from intimate 10-passenger vehicles to large 40+ passenger party buses. All vehicles feature premium sound systems, LED lighting, climate control, and professional chauffeurs.

## Service Areas

- [Pittsburgh Downtown](https://pittpartybus.com/locations/downtown)
- [North Hills](https://pittpartybus.com/locations/north-hills)
- [South Hills](https://pittpartybus.com/locations/south-hills)
- [South Side](https://pittpartybus.com/locations/south-side)
- [Oakland](https://pittpartybus.com/locations/oakland)
